item.title: They really can’t stay away from characterising themselves correctly as the storm troopers#greenscreenvideo
item.description:

item.title: Israel got caught lying about the UAE and Saudi Arabia being neutral countries and now they are claiming this gross alliance as ...
item.description:
Israel got caught lying about the UAE and Saudi Arabia being neutral countries and now they are claiming this gross alliance as a solution to the “Arab / Israeli “ conflict when in fact it is just further complicity in the g*nocide#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Truly it is people within my community that disappoint me the most because gay men need to remember that as long as patriarchy e...
item.description:
Truly it is people within my community that disappoint me the most because gay men need to remember that as long as patriarchy exists we will both be gay and be men and one does not cancel out the concern that the other reasonably insights #greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Be extremely clear I know that most people that do birthright do not end up doing Aliyah, but the function of it is not only to ...
item.description:
Be extremely clear I know that most people that do birthright do not end up doing Aliyah, but the function of it is not only to push people to do so but also to normalise and tolerate the concept of this ethnostate#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: By the way, no such thing as a defensive weapon because every single defence of an aggressor enables those aggression
item.description:
By the way, no such thing as a defensive weapon because every single defence of an aggressor enables those aggression. Every single person understands this when their enemy is using something to defend themselves that someone else gave them, we should understand it when our “ally” does too#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
